app.name: simplesavings.app
app.tagline: Model your savings, then strategize with AI to reach your goal faster.

calculator.timeframeYearsHint: how long you plan to save
calculator.timeframeYearsWithdrawalHint: how long you plan to draw down
calculator.timeframeDateHint: when you want to reach your goal
calculator.interestRateCryptoHint: expected annual return (crypto returns are highly variable)
calculator.goalAmountHint: target amount you want to reach
calculator.hitGoalAt: You hit your goal in Year {year}
calculator.extendForGoal: Extend {years} more years to reach your goal
calculator.cryptoNotice: Amounts are in {symbol}. Enter your investment in {symbol} units.

save.failedToSave: Failed to save. Check your browser settings.
save.descriptionPlaceholder: What is this savings plan for?
save.goalsPlaceholder: What are you trying to achieve?

share.shareLinkDesc: Send a link that opens this exact calculation
share.shareNarrativeDesc: Copy a plain-language summary to paste anywhere
share.signInToShareDesc: Sign in to create a shareable link and track who you've shared it with.
share.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
share.linkCopiedTo: Your link has been copied to clipboard. Send it to

profile.title: My Scenarios
profile.noScenariosHint: Save a calculation to see it here
profile.signInPrompt: Sign in to view your saved scenarios

insights.title: Insights
insights.comingSoonHint: In-depth analysis of your savings plan will be available here.
insights.cryptoNote: Crypto asset returns are highly volatile. Insights will factor in this risk.
insights.blurbCtaGoalGap: Let's work out how to close your {amount} gap

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

milestones.quarter: You're 25% of the way to your goal! Keep it up.
milestones.half: Halfway there! Your money is working hard.
milestones.threeQuarters: 75% of the way! Almost at your goal.

upsell.title: Insights ✦
upsell.bullet1: Ask anything — your numbers, your goals, your timeline
upsell.bullet2: Financial freedom targets, safe withdrawal limits, compounding milestones
upsell.hook0: See exactly what changing one number does to your timeline, month by month
upsell.hook1: Run a stress test: what does a 2% return drop in year one actually cost you?
upsell.hook2: Find out which single variable is doing the most work in your plan
upsell.hook3: Model what happens if you increase contributions by just $200 a month
upsell.signInFirst: Sign in first to see your personalized insights.
upsell.hasPro: You have Pro — save a scenario to start chatting.

chart.goalReached: 🎯 You hit your goal of {amount} in Year {year}
chart.goalNotReached: 📈 Extend your timeframe to reach your goal of {amount}

pricing.headline: Meet your AI savings strategist
pricing.subhead: The calculator is free. The strategist helps you close the gap to your goal.
pricing.disclaimer: Educational simulation, not financial advice. Cancel anytime.

sample.title: Pro Sample
sample.f1: Deep AI analysis on one plan
